caption: Table 82. Document revision history
rows: Updated cover page (TSSOP20 size); Updated Table 2: STM32C071x8/xB family device features and peripheral counts (ADC internal channel count); Updated Section 3.7.4: Low-power modes, Section 3.17: Inter-integrated circuit interface (I2C)("controller" and "target" terms used) and Section 3.20: Universal serial bus device (USB) and host (USBH); Added Section 5.3.15: Extended interrupt and event controller input (EXTI) characteristics; Updated Table 22: Current characteristics, Figure 16: V vs. temperature, Table 47: EMI characteristics, REFINT Table 56: ADC characteristics, Table 59: Temperature sensor characteristics, Figure 30: SPI timing diagram - slave mode and CPHA = 0, Figure 31: SPI timing diagram - slave mode and CPHA = 1, and Table 81: Thermal resistance; Updated Section 6.2: WLCSP19 package information (B0MQ).
